title: cedrus libanitica subsp. brevifolia
intro: Cedrus libanitica subsp. brevifolia, also known as the Atlas cedar, is a plant species that belongs to the cypress family. The Atlas cedar has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and protect against certain diseases due to its high concentration of essential oils. The Atlas cedar can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
